title: Looking for stuff from Otakon 2009 pannel from Friday
display_title: Looking for stuff from Otakon 2009 pannel from Friday
wikitext:
[]: Looking for stuff from Otakon 2009 pannel from Friday             Quote Post by deathnote666 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:02 pm Looking for any video, audio, or downloadables from the Evangelion pannel at otakon 2009 on friday. Looking for at least the phone conversation using the voice synthesizer but will take what all is available.

[]:             Quote Post by Fredrick2003 » Wed Jul 29, 2009 10:01 pm I would settle for a recording of decent quality myself...

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Jul 29, 2009 10:09 pm look in the off topic section theres a thread about otakon 2009 and evamonkey posted things from the panel

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 29, 2009 10:30 pm I re-zipped and re-uploaded the zip file of the materials from the Eva panel. If it still doesn't work, then your computer does not like you. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=262056#262056``

[]:             Quote Post by deathnote666 » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:46 am guess my computer hates me then... thanks for trying again!

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 30, 2009 11:51 am well i know from personal experience that if you have a mac most of the video files do not work.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:19 pm Yeah... if you can't play it, use the power of Google and alchemy to unlock the delicious gooey center that is encased within the various file formats.

[]:             Quote Post by deathnote666 » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:00 pm i was able to get the phone conversation and macgyver vid off of it but not the rest. had to ask for help to get that much. they did it on their end. what did you use to zip it and what programs do you recommend to unzip it, besides winzip?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:20 pm deathnote666 wrote: i was able to get the phone conversation and macgyver vid off of it but not the rest. had to ask for help to get that much. they did it on their end. what did you use to zip it and what programs do you recommend to unzip it, besides winzip?

[]:             Quote Post by deathnote666 » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:32 pm i wen to the winrar site but am not certain as to which one i should download since i didn't see anyone that fit my description. i am using a vista pc. how do i open the DS_Store file? All I see in the folder is the phone conversation, macgyver vid, and the rebuild vid but that will not open.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:58 pm deathnote666 wrote: i wen to the winrar site but am not certain as to which one i should download since i didn't see anyone that fit my description. i am using a vista pc. how do i open the DS_Store file? All I see in the folder is the phone conversation, macgyver vid, and the rebuild vid but that will not open.

[]:             Quote Post by deathnote666 » Thu Jul 30, 2009 4:28 pm could you post the eva Haruhi Dance and adjective vids as separate files? if not, it's ok. thanks for what you have posted!

[]:             Quote Post by NeverKnowsBest » Thu Aug 06, 2009 6:23 am o_O....omfg. There was an Evangelion Panel at Otakon this year? What time did it start? I got there late Friday afternoon because I had to go to work.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 06, 2009 6:55 am NeverKnowsBest wrote: o_O....omfg. There was an Evangelion Panel at Otakon this year? What time did it start? I got there late Friday afternoon because I had to go to work.
summary:
[]: Looking for stuff from Otakon 2009 pannel from Friday             Quote Post by deathnote666 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:02 pm Looking for any video, audio, or downloadables from the Evangelion pannel at otakon 2009 on friday. Looking for at least the phone conversation using the voice synthesizer but will take what all is available.

[]:             Quote Post by Fredrick2003 » Wed Jul 2
